input_artifacts.content:
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-09 09:26 EST
Subject: Re: competitive positioning Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the competitive positioning proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
Date: 2024-02-08 16:20 EST
Subject: Follow-up: competitive positioning Review

Just checking in on the competitive positioning proposal. Our IT Director is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Samantha Okafor <samantha.okafor@evergreensol.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 16:36 EST
Subject: Re: Re: competitive positioning Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for competitive positioning. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: competitive positioning Discussion - Evergreen Solutions
Date: 2024-02-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions), David Chen (Microsoft), David (Evergreen Solutions)

[00:02:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on competitive positioning from our last session.

[00:07:00] David Chen (Microsoft): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:10:00] David (Evergreen Solutions): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:12:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:17:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:21:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:25:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:27:00] Samantha Okafor (Evergreen Solutions): Let me add some context -- we've been working on resource allocation and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:32:00] David (Evergreen Solutions): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?
